Interface IGeometricFunctionArguments

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control geometric function arguments.

[Guid("EE17FF50-4762-46B4-A1D0-E111FD7FFDE1")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IGeometricFunctionArguments

Properties

AppendGeodataXform

Indicates whether the the geodata transformation is appended to the existing one from the input raster.

bool AppendGeodataXform { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

ConstantZ

The constant Z value in meters.

double ConstantZ { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

CorrectGeoid

Indicates if Geoid correction is needed.

bool CorrectGeoid { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

DEM

The Digital Elevation Model (DEM) for orthorectification.

object DEM { get; set; }

Property Value

object

Examples

Sample Snippet

GeodataXform

The geodata transformation.

IGeodataXform GeodataXform { get; set; }

Property Value

IGeodataXform

Examples

Sample Snippet

Raster

The source raster object.

object Raster { get; set; }

Property Value

object

Examples

Sample Snippet

ZFactor

The conversion factor from DEM Z unit to meters.

double ZFactor { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

ZOffset

The Z offset in meters applied to DEM.

double ZOffset { get; set; }

Property Value

double
